since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.01%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC -1.68% · Gold -1.62% · Nasdaq100 -0.02%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.01%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.01%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.52%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.52%, ANET +6.87%, BIDU +5.20%, AVGO +5.07%, AMBA +4.88%. Laggards: PANW -5.58%, UPST -5.23%, ZS -4.07%, WDAY -4.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.98% at $146.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
